'''Shanda Dok''' was a [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. During the [[Subjugation of Fitca|subjugation]] of [[Fitca Prime]] by [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] interrogator [[Mox Slosin]], Dok took part in the first Alliance support wave on Fitca Prime. Unfortunately, she was captured and interrogated by Slosin. She refused to betray the Alliance, and thus the [[Torture/Legends|torture]] continued until her [[Death/Legends|death]]. Eventually, the subjugation of Fitca Prime was completed.<ref name="AIR" />
